## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss Premise account status and potential future content strategies.](https://fathom.video/share/YrWeymdUzsrKucAtwqWPg4uRC9z1bHQg?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Premise account is being treated as churned; no new workflows to be pitched](https://fathom.video/share/YrWeymdUzsrKucAtwqWPg4uRC9z1bHQg?tab=summary&timestamp=329.0)
  - [Keep scheduled call with Jessica, discuss possibilities without hard pitching](https://fathom.video/share/YrWeymdUzsrKucAtwqWPg4uRC9z1bHQg?tab=summary&timestamp=336.0)
  - [Case studies, user stories, and expert guides could be future offerings if they return](https://fathom.video/share/YrWeymdUzsrKucAtwqWPg4uRC9z1bHQg?tab=summary&timestamp=101.0)
  - [Need to align with Marcel on engagement transition plans before committing](https://fathom.video/share/YrWeymdUzsrKucAtwqWPg4uRC9z1bHQg?tab=summary&timestamp=189.0)

## Topics

### Current Account Status

  - [Premise is considered as churned due to being "too early" for the current offering](https://fathom.video/share/YrWeymdUzsrKucAtwqWPg4uRC9z1bHQg?tab=summary&timestamp=181.0)
  - [Jessica (client) wants to pause current content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/YrWeymdUzsrKucAtwqWPg4uRC9z1bHQg?tab=summary&timestamp=208.0)
  - [Team is ramping down work for Premise in the final month](https://fathom.video/share/YrWeymdUzsrKucAtwqWPg4uRC9z1bHQg?tab=summary&timestamp=235.0)

### Potential Future Content Offerings

  - [Case studies, user stories, expert guides, objection handlers discussed as possibilities](https://fathom.video/share/YrWeymdUzsrKucAtwqWPg4uRC9z1bHQg?tab=summary&timestamp=55.0)
  - [Case study workflow:](https://fathom.video/share/YrWeymdUzsrKucAtwqWPg4uRC9z1bHQg?tab=summary&timestamp=612.0)
      - [Can use a set of \~10 template questions](https://fathom.video/share/YrWeymdUzsrKucAtwqWPg4uRC9z1bHQg?tab=summary&timestamp=612.0)
      - [Clients fill out form with 2-3 sentence answers](https://fathom.video/share/YrWeymdUzsrKucAtwqWPg4uRC9z1bHQg?tab=summary&timestamp=545.0)
      - [AirOps has templates for building these workflows](https://fathom.video/share/YrWeymdUzsrKucAtwqWPg4uRC9z1bHQg?tab=summary&timestamp=675.0)
  - [Future state: 30-min interviews + workflow for superior product](https://fathom.video/share/YrWeymdUzsrKucAtwqWPg4uRC9z1bHQg?tab=summary&timestamp=697.0)
  - [Need to consider pricing, deliverables, and expected results for new offerings](https://fathom.video/share/YrWeymdUzsrKucAtwqWPg4uRC9z1bHQg?tab=summary&timestamp=730.0)

### Client Communication Strategy

  - [Keep scheduled call with Jessica](https://fathom.video/share/YrWeymdUzsrKucAtwqWPg4uRC9z1bHQg?tab=summary&timestamp=362.0)
  - [Discuss content possibilities without pitching new workflows](https://fathom.video/share/YrWeymdUzsrKucAtwqWPg4uRC9z1bHQg?tab=summary&timestamp=368.0)
  - [Position different content angles; if interest shown, mark as "maybe" for future](https://fathom.video/share/YrWeymdUzsrKucAtwqWPg4uRC9z1bHQg?tab=summary&timestamp=371.0)
  - [Avoid discussing transition plans due to ongoing conversations between Jessica, Marcel, and Kevin](https://fathom.video/share/YrWeymdUzsrKucAtwqWPg4uRC9z1bHQg?tab=summary&timestamp=174.0)

### Internal Alignment Needed

  - [Jimmy to discuss with Marcel about engagement transition plans](https://fathom.video/share/YrWeymdUzsrKucAtwqWPg4uRC9z1bHQg?tab=summary&timestamp=839.0)
  - [Mara to avoid touching on transition conversation until internal alignment is reached](https://fathom.video/share/YrWeymdUzsrKucAtwqWPg4uRC9z1bHQg?tab=summary&timestamp=860.0)
  - [Team struggling with technical aspects; a demo could be beneficial](https://fathom.video/share/YrWeymdUzsrKucAtwqWPg4uRC9z1bHQg?tab=summary&timestamp=40.0)

### Analytics and Pricing Considerations

  - [Need to package pricing, deliverables, and expected results for potential new work streams](https://fathom.video/share/YrWeymdUzsrKucAtwqWPg4uRC9z1bHQg?tab=summary&timestamp=730.0)
  - [Tying content to analytics remains a familiar challenge](https://fathom.video/share/YrWeymdUzsrKucAtwqWPg4uRC9z1bHQg?tab=summary&timestamp=781.0)
